title: How to create a Jira Ticket from Monday .com board

posts.author: cee (Christine Oji)
posts.cookedHtml: I need help/assistance in having a ticket in Jira after completing an Intake form on Monday board. I completed all the required steps to create form. I did the integration with token from jIRA. I do not know why the ticket in Jira cannot be created even with the integration of Monday.com and Jira. Thank you for anticipated assistance.
